rules: capture the felt connection BEFORE deep reading
score every entry, including nulls and misleading leads
the metric is the full outcome distribution, never hits alone
retrospective entries are labelled and excluded from any skill claim

entries.felt_connection: electrical tuning of a resonance with nonlinear thresholds — like trim sensitivity
patterns that come from internal rearrangement, not total change
geometry spacing reshaping what states exist
the right bookkeeping makes a hard system triangular
entries.adopted: workflow demo only; no RGCS solve restructured; scored weak until a measured benefit exists

entries.felt_connection: phase between two partial waves selecting mode families
entries.adopted: parity selection + azimuthal decomposition, computationally verified (composite_modes.py)
